algorithmic_reference_boundary.forbidden_use: old mesh, old coordinates, old masks, old UVs, old materials, old textures, old dimensions, or old renders
algorithmic_reference_boundary.permitted_use: algorithmic sequence, direct-surface ownership, ruled closure, completion, and independent-audit structure only

artifact_status: candidate pending independent audit and Flamestrike decision
artistic_soul_review_rubric: two faceted stone strike masses remain readable
central layered diamond remains the focal point
narrow shaft remains contrasted against the massive head
grip and weighted pommel remain distinct
cold blue rune light stays restrained
no blank back, facade, carrier, copied depth face, or projection shell
protected stone/core gaps remain visibly open

canonical_geometry_record: exact rational vertex position before float serialization
clean_replay_plan.forced_interruption_test: interrupt after source-half audit, resume from the verified checkpoint, and require the same final canonical result

closure_and_contact_instructions.instruction: Join only the approved ordered C02 inner boundary sets. Every protected run stays open; unmatched coordinates stop the later build.
Join only the approved ordered C03 inner boundary sets. Every protected run stays open; unmatched coordinates stop the later build.
C04 replaces the outward C03 exterior occurrence at +X. Use one shared boundary and no strike-face backing plate.
C04 replaces the outward C03 exterior occurrence at +X. Exclude the exact C01-reserved right pixels and create no strike-face backing plate.
Use the exact y=295 front contact once. C12 and C01 may share that boundary but may not carry coincident walls.
Use the exact y=600 adjacent owner runs once. The one-pixel run difference remains source evidence and is joined only by the approved straight boundary rule.
Join at exact front edge y=670 and its source-derived ring. Do not add a receiver volume.
At source edge y=870, use one exact planar positive-X half-annular shoulder from the two exact adjacent R8 radius records. Add no coincident wall.
At source edge y=955, use one exact planar positive-X half-annular shoulder from the two exact adjacent R8 radius records. Add no coincident wall.
At source edge y=1110, use one coordinate-equal common half-ring from the two exact adjacent R8 radius records. Add no coincident wall.
At source edge y=1150, use one exact planar positive-X half-annular shoulder from the two exact adjacent R8 radius records. Add no coincident wall.
At source edge y=1220, use one exact planar positive-X half-annular shoulder from the two exact adjacent R8 radius records. Add no coincident wall.
Close only the exact terminal ring from front row 1270 at world Z=0; do not extend the radius or Z range.
Close only the exact terminal ring from front row 208 at world Z=170; do not extend the radius or Z range.
Every approved exterior-connected protected pixel remains unoccupied in every projection. A later conflict stops before geometry is saved.
After every source-half gate passes, apply exactly one Rz180 completion to the whole source set. Merge only coordinate-equal seam vertices.

construction_order: verify every authority hash and exact preflight gate
materialize exact evidence catalogs without changing coordinates
build one selected C04 face half and perform its one local mirror
build C01/C02/C03 visible owner surfaces; keep unresolved central axial evidence reserved and non-geometric
create only declared shared contacts, ruled faces, shoulders, and terminal caps
prove protected spaces empty and every visible owner occurs once
apply exactly one whole-asset Rz180 and coordinate-equal weld
audit the saved candidate directly before any review render

EQ_BOTTOM_OWNER_PLANE.role: exact bottom-owner underside domain for the measured source half
EQ_BOTTOM_OWNER_PLANE.source_half_selector: retain only pixel cells whose exact sample has Y<=0; the one Rz180 completion supplies the complement

EQ_BOTTOM_XY.role: exact bottom source-edge to world X/Y mapping

EQ_C04_METAL_SOURCE_HALF.role: map the metal-center-piece right owner into the negative-Y face half

EQ_C04_RUNE_SOURCE_HALF.role: map the rune-side right owner into the negative-Y face half

EQ_CANDIDATE_AXIAL_INTERSECTION.formula: S_compatible=S_exact_owner_cell intersect {(X,Y): -D_candidate/2<=Y<=0}; retain only nonzero-area intersections and do not move an original cell edge
EQ_CANDIDATE_AXIAL_INTERSECTION.outside_classification: exact axial source evidence outside the selected candidate depth remains comparison/color evidence and creates no geometry
EQ_CANDIDATE_AXIAL_INTERSECTION.role: enforce the approved candidate-specific final depth without stretching, normalizing, or moving an axial source pixel

EQ_COLUMN_WRAP.role: each retained exact source column owns its proportional U interval; no source column is skipped or repeated

EQ_EQUAL_COORDINATE_WELD.formula: merge only vertices with exactly equal canonical rational coordinates; no tolerance search or nearest-point weld

EQ_EXACT_OWNER_BOUNDARY.formula: boundary edges are integer half-open cell edges incident to exactly one owner cell and one non-owner cell
EQ_EXACT_OWNER_BOUNDARY.role: derive no new contour beyond the exact owner membership

EQ_FACE_LOCAL_MIRROR.role: complete one positive-X strike face from one measured face half; weld only coordinate-equal Y=0 vertices

EQ_FRONT_OWNER_PLANE.role: place an exact front-owned visible domain once on the candidate front envelope; no copied depth face

EQ_FRONT_XZ.role: exact front source-edge to world X/Z mapping

EQ_HALF_ANNULAR_SHOULDER.role: one planar station closure between exact adjacent R8 radii; omit when the radii are coordinate-equal

EQ_ORDERED_RULED_FACE.pairing_rule: Parameterize each approved ordered pixel-edge polyline by exact cumulative source-edge length. Use the sorted union of their exact rational breakpoints; evaluate only along the existing straight source edges at each shared parameter, then join corresponding values. Never smooth, search a nearby row, or move an owner boundary.
EQ_ORDERED_RULED_FACE.role: straight hidden connection inside the owning component domain; never a new exterior silhouette

EQ_PLANAR_HALF_CAP.role: close only the exact C11 bottom or C12 top terminal ring

EQ_RADIUS_FROM_FRONT.owner_selection_rule: read the positive edge only from the surface instruction's exact source_ownership_ref; never from the whole-row outer interval when another component is present
EQ_RADIUS_FROM_FRONT.role: new R8 front pixel consequence; old fixed 5/42/18/11 cm component values are not used

EQ_RIGHT_YZ.role: exact right source-edge to world Y/Z mapping

EQ_ROTATIONAL_SURFACE.role: exact source-derived positive-X half rotational surface

EQ_RZ180_COMPLETION.role: whole-asset completion after the source set is validated

EQ_TOP_OWNER_PLANE.role: exact top-owner cap domain for the measured source half
EQ_TOP_OWNER_PLANE.source_half_selector: retain only pixel cells whose exact sample has Y<=0; the one Rz180 completion supplies the complement

EQ_TOP_XY.role: exact top source-edge to world X/Y mapping

CORR_C01_C06_C07_FRONT_CONTACTS.scope: exact adjacent source-row edge sets only

CORR_C02_FRONT_TOP_BOTTOM_INNER_OWNER_ED.scope: ordered exact source-edge sets only; no point pairing or surface created

CORR_C03_FRONT_TOP_BOTTOM_INNER_OWNER_ED.scope: ordered exact source-edge sets only; no point pairing or surface created

CORR_C04_RIGHT_CANDIDATE_FACE_EDGES.scope: two candidate-specific ordered source-edge sets about x=557

OWN_FRONT_C07.ownership_rule: all exact selected front-source runs inside the approved component station interval

OWN_FRONT_C07B.ownership_rule: all exact selected front-source runs inside the approved component station interval

OWN_FRONT_C08.ownership_rule: all exact selected front-source runs inside the approved component station interval

OWN_FRONT_C09.ownership_rule: all exact selected front-source runs inside the approved component station interval

OWN_FRONT_C10.ownership_rule: all exact selected front-source runs inside the approved component station interval

OWN_FRONT_C11.ownership_rule: all exact selected front-source runs inside the approved component station interval

OWN_FRONT_C12_FULL.ownership_rule: rows 208..220 use only exact Step 06 selected runs; rows 221..294 use only the approved Step 09A reserved C12 owner

future_execution_contract.illegal_transition_action: fail closed and preserve the last verified state
future_execution_contract.missing_environment_field_action: fail before Blender starts; do not infer a default
future_execution_contract.resume_rule: Resume only from the last output whose canonical hash and state-transition record independently verify.

mandatory_step12_gates: every constructed surface resolves to one blueprint surface instruction
every hidden face resolves to one closure instruction
no protected source pixel is occupied
no owner pixel is claimed by two visible surfaces in one view
no independent backing wall or copied depth face exists
no extrusion, slab, primitive replacement, or generalized cross-section exists
every rotational radius replays from the exact front row
each C04 variant retains its own exact completed depth
one C04 local mirror and one whole Rz180 occur, no more
pivot is world (0,0,0) and height is exactly 170 cm
LOD0 does not exceed the hard cap or the build stops for an amendment

value.assembly_axis: world Z through right-source diamond center x=557

next_gate: independent document audit, visible review, then a separate Flamestrike approve/revise/reject/blocked decision

numeric_precedence.final_depth_precedence: candidate-specific right-view completed depth controls final geometry; centered top/bottom mean is comparison and orientation evidence only

older_fixed_component_values_not_carried.reason: carrying any of these fixed values would require component-specific scaling forbidden by the newer R8 no-stretch contract

world_frame.assembly_axis: world Z through right-source diamond center x=557

plain_english_goal: Tell a later approved build exactly which measured source owns each surface and exactly which approved equation may connect it, without building anything now.

reserved_evidence.rule: These exact pixels remain shared C01/C12 top-view color and orientation evidence. Step 09A explicitly did not decide their C01-versus-C12 split, so they create no independent plane, plate, fill, or geometry surface. Later material registration may use them only on geometry already created by a separately cited exact component instruction.

These exact pixels remain shared central underside color and orientation evidence. Their component and Z assignment is not approved, so they create no independent plane, plate, fill, or geometry surface. Protected surroundings remain empty.
These exact pixels remain C01 visibility/color evidence and are excluded from C04. They do not create an independent plate, receiver, backing surface, or new geometry plane.
Back remains color/comparison evidence only; it may not replace front-owned geometry or create a copied depth face.
Left remains comparison evidence and the final negative-X strike face comes only from the approved Rz180 completion.

surface_instructions.instruction: Triangulate only the exact C01 front owner domain on the candidate front envelope. Interior pixels remain UV/color owners; only exact owner boundaries may create geometry.
surface_instructions.visible_occurrence_rule: one front occurrence; the back occurrence comes only from Rz180

surface_instructions.instruction: Build the exact front-owned C02 visible domain once.
surface_instructions.visible_occurrence_rule: one front occurrence; no backing wall

surface_instructions.instruction: Build only the exact negative-Y source-half cells from the approved top C02 owner at MEAS_C02.world_z_top_cm. Intersect each exact cell with the selected candidate depth; never stretch it. Preserve every protected gap.
surface_instructions.visible_occurrence_rule: one source-half occurrence; Rz180 supplies the complement

surface_instructions.instruction: Build only the exact negative-Y source-half cells from the approved bottom C02 owner at MEAS_C02.world_z_bottom_cm. Intersect each exact cell with the selected candidate depth; never stretch it. Preserve every protected gap.
surface_instructions.visible_occurrence_rule: one source-half occurrence; Rz180 supplies the complement

surface_instructions.instruction: Build the exact front-owned C03 visible domain once.
surface_instructions.visible_occurrence_rule: one front occurrence; no backing wall

surface_instructions.instruction: Build only the exact negative-Y source-half cells from the approved top C03 owner at MEAS_C03.world_z_top_cm. Intersect each exact cell with the selected candidate depth; never stretch it. Preserve every protected gap.
surface_instructions.visible_occurrence_rule: one source-half occurrence; Rz180 supplies the complement

surface_instructions.instruction: Build only the exact negative-Y source-half cells from the approved bottom C03 owner at MEAS_C03.world_z_bottom_cm. Intersect each exact cell with the selected candidate depth; never stretch it. Preserve every protected gap.
surface_instructions.visible_occurrence_rule: one source-half occurrence; Rz180 supplies the complement

surface_instructions.instruction: Build the rune-side owner half at +X, locally mirror it once about Y=0, and weld only the exact center edge. Do not build a plate thickness or backing face.
surface_instructions.visible_occurrence_rule: one completed positive-X strike face before whole Rz180

surface_instructions.instruction: Build the metal-center-piece owner half at +X, locally mirror it once about Y=0, and weld only the exact center edge. Pixels reserved to C01 remain excluded.
surface_instructions.visible_occurrence_rule: one completed positive-X strike face before whole Rz180

surface_instructions.instruction: Use every approved C06 row and its positive exact owner edge as r(z); retain source-column U ownership without fixed old dimensions.
surface_instructions.visible_occurrence_rule: one positive-X rotational half; Rz180 supplies the complement

surface_instructions.instruction: Use the exact R8 front rows 670..869 and their new radius-by-Z consequence. The old fixed 5 cm shaft diameter is not carried into this run.
surface_instructions.visible_occurrence_rule: one positive-X rotational half; Rz180 supplies the complement

surface_instructions.instruction: Use only the exact R8 ferrule rows and their radius profile.
surface_instructions.visible_occurrence_rule: one positive-X rotational half; Rz180 supplies the complement

surface_instructions.instruction: Use only exact R8 grip rows and proportional source-column wrap. Leather phase is material evidence and may not deform the geometry.
surface_instructions.visible_occurrence_rule: one positive-X rotational half; Rz180 supplies the complement

surface_instructions.instruction: Use only exact R8 collar rows and their radius profile.
surface_instructions.visible_occurrence_rule: one positive-X rotational half; Rz180 supplies the complement

surface_instructions.instruction: Use only exact R8 pommel rows and their radius profile. The old fixed 18 cm length and 11 cm width are not carried into this run.
surface_instructions.visible_occurrence_rule: one positive-X rotational half; Rz180 supplies the complement

surface_instructions.instruction: Use only exact R8 terminal-cap rows and their radius profile.
surface_instructions.visible_occurrence_rule: one positive-X rotational half; Rz180 supplies the complement

surface_instructions.instruction: Rows 208..220 use the exact front selected runs; rows 221..294 use only the reserved existing C12 owner. No C12 shape is inferred from stone pixels.
surface_instructions.visible_occurrence_rule: one positive-X rotational half; Rz180 supplies the complement

topology_and_performance_plan.fidelity_precedence: Exact source boundaries, protected gaps, contacts, and the primary silhouette may not be reduced to meet a budget.
topology_and_performance_plan.over_cap_action: Stop before saving geometry and report Blueprint block: rule missing; request a separate performance amendment.
topology_and_performance_plan.pixel_to_topology_rule: Owner pixels control exact surface membership and UV/color ownership. Geometry is required at every exact boundary change and approved radius change; planar interiors may be triangulated without moving or deleting an owner boundary.

TR_C01_C06.closure: one exact planar positive-X half-annular shoulder

TR_C07B_C08.closure: one exact planar positive-X half-annular shoulder

TR_C07_C07B.closure: one exact planar positive-X half-annular shoulder

TR_C09_C10.closure: one exact planar positive-X half-annular shoulder

TR_C10_C11.closure: one exact planar positive-X half-annular shoulder

uv_material_texture_plan.source_visible_color_rule: Exact owner-view pixels remain view-local color evidence. Back, left, ornament phase, and dark-value evidence may not change geometry.
uv_material_texture_plan.uv_rule: UV ownership is component-specific. Rotational rows use the exact source-column U intervals from EQ_COLUMN_WRAP. No UV is created in Step 11.
